heading: ALLOCATION OF REVENUE: CERTAIN MUNICIPALITIES IN BORDER COUNTIES
operative_text: (a) This section applies only to a municipality that is the largest municipality in a county described by Section 352.002(a)(14). (b) At least 50 percent of the hotel occupancy tax revenue collected by a municipality described by Subsection (a) must be allocated for the purposes provided by Section 351.101(a)(3). (c) Not more than 15 percent of the hotel occupancy tax revenue collected by a municipality described by Subsection (a) may be used for the purposes provided by Section 351.101(a)(4). (d) Not more than 15 percent of the hotel occupancy tax revenue collected by a municipality described by Subsection (a) may be used for the purposes provided by Section 351.101(a)(5).
_note: Text references an expiration in Subsection (f), but Subsection (f) is not present in the provided text.
